title: Wildfire-prone Western states are using AI for early detection, including in Aurora
description: AI-powered smoke detection cameras are being deployed across the Western US to detect wildfires early and help save lives and property, with utilities and agencies using the technology to respond to fires before 911 calls are even made.

title: Kevin O'Leary's $115 Billion AI Bet Has More Than One Problem
description: Shark Tank star Kevin O'Leary isn't hunting for the small equity business in 2026. The TV personality has firmly turned toward what he sees as the ultimate commodity of the current tech revolution – the physical infrastructure required to keep it going. When Geopolitics Meet Finance O'Leary's key domestic project is the Stratos Project in Box Elder County, Utah. Spanning 40,000 acres, the site is designed to reach 9 GW of power—a figure the Wall Street Journal put as “equal to more than 20% of all data-center capacity currently operating in the U.S.” Yet to avoid straining the national grid, O’Leary proposes burning natural gas on-site via the Ruby pipeline. The first phase would target 3GW, at a cost of roughly $45 billion. "I think we're in a competition with the Chinese on economic superiority and military superiority," he noted, reasoning that the motivation is as much geopolitical as it is financial. North of the border in his native Canada, O'Leary is doubling down with a proposed $70-billion, 7.5-gigawatt AI data center campus in Alberta. However, despite being exempt from provincial environmental impact assessment, the project still faces numerous local permits, including approval from the First Nation. "The minute we get the permit, that triggers a whole bunch of other activities in terms of how we finance it, when we start engineering, design, everything ... Full story available on Benzinga.com

title: New Wave Wealth Advisors Bets on Data Centers to Capture AI Growth
description: This ETF targets companies advancing data center and digital infrastructure, tracking leaders in global connectivity and cloud adoption.

title: 'This is Fine' creator KC Green accuses AI startup Artisan of using his artwork without permission
description: KC Green, creator of the "This is Fine" meme, says AI startup Artisan used his copyrighted comic in ads without permission or payment. The accusation is particularly sharp given Artisan's recent billboards urging businesses to "stop hiring humans."

title: Next Crypto To Explode: BNB's ICO Playbook Returns With AlphaPepe's AI Meme Presale
description: BNB became one of crypto's greatest early-entry stories because buyers understood the exchange-token model before the rest of the market did. The biggest gains did not come after Binance became a global giant. They came before the crowd fully priced
